title: StageDefinition - Metadata API
description: Represents a collection of fields to set up the states and transitions for Stage Management.

active.description: Indicates whether the stage definition is active (true) or not (false).

description.description: The description of the stage definition.

masterLabel.description: A user-friendly name for stage definition, which is defined when the metadata component is created.

referenceObject.description: The reference object associated with the stage definition.

referenceObjectField.description: The name of the field in the reference object used to define stages.

referenceObjectRecordType.description: The record type of a reference object associated with the stage definition.

stageTransition.description: A collection of fields to set up transitions between two states.

stageValue.description: A collection of fields to set up the field values of an object for which stages are defined.

criteria.description: A collection of fields to set up the criteria for the object stage transition and object stage change.

customPermission.description: The custom permission associated with the stage transition. The custom permission required to initiate a stage change.

fromStageValue.description: The From Stage that's associated with the referenced object's stage transition.

stepGroup.description: A collection of fields to set up the stage fulfillment step definition.

toStageValue.description: The To Stagethat's associated with the referenced object's stage transition.

userPermission.description: Specifies the type of user permission needed to initiate a stage change.Values are: CoordinateClinicalTrials CoordinateClnclTrialExprcUsr ManageClinicalTrials ParticipateClinicalTrials ProcessOrder

condition.description: A collection of fields to set up the rules in transition criteria and stage change, including the object state, logic, and values.

criteriaType.description: Specifies the criteria type used to execute the transition. Values are: AND CUSTOMLOGIC OR

errorMessage.description: A custom error message that's displayed when stage transition criteria evaluation fails. Available in API version 64.0 and later.

executionType.description: Specifies the type of logic used to execute the criteria. Values are: CONDITION FLOW

flowDefinitionName.description: Specifies the developer name of the Flow that executes when the criteria execution type is set to FLOW. Available in API version 63.0 and later.

isChildObject.description: Indicates whether the target object in the stage criteria represents a child object in a parent-child relationship (true) or not (false).Available in API version 63.0 and later.

logicalExpression.description: Formula to specify custom logic. Compares the Criteria field to the Value field.

targetFieldName.description: Specifies the field name on the target object that's used in the stage transition criteria evaluation. Available in API version 63.0 and later.

targetObject.description: Object that's used in a Parent-Child object relationship condition.

operator.description: Specifies the operator used in the transition criteria. Values are: Contains DoesNotContain Equals GreaterOrEqual GreaterThan LessOrEqual LessThan NotEqualTo StartsWith

sequenceNumber.description: Specifies the order of the object state transition condition in a sequence.

sourceField.description: The object field to define filter conditions.

value.description: Value of the field used in the transition criteria.

name.description: The name of the stage fulfillment step definition group.

step.description: A collection of fields to set up fullfillment step definitions for stages and transitions.

apiName.description: The developer name of the stage fulfillment step definition.

assignedToQueue.description: The queue associated with the stage fulfillment step definition.

assignedToUser.description: The user associated with the stage fulfillment step definition.

dependency.description: A collection of fields to set up the stage fulfillment step dependency between two steps.

executeOnRule.description: Specifies the expression set for the fulfillment step. The step is executed only when the corresponding expression set is set to true. Available in API version 62.0 and later.

flowDefinitionName.description: The name of the flow added to the step definition.

integrationDefinitionName.description: The ID associated with the integration provider definition.

name.description: The name of the stage fulfillment step definition.

omniscriptName.description: The name of the Omniscript defined in step definition.

runAsUser.description: The ID of the user associated with the step definition. The user required to execute the step definition.

stepType.description: Specifies the type of fulfillment step.

step.description: The step definition for the fulfillment step.

criteria.description: A collection of fields to set up the criteria for the object stage transition and object stage change.

stepGroup.description: A collection of fields to set up the stage fulfillment step definition.

value.description: The value of the field used in the transition criteria.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a StageDefinition component.
declarative_metadata_sample_definition.code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<StageDefinition xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata">
    <active>false</active>
    <description>Application form Stage transitions</description>
    <masterLabel>basic</masterLabel>
    <referenceObject>ApplicationForm</referenceObject>
    <referenceObjectField>Stage</referenceObjectField>
    <stageTransition>
        <criteria>
            <condition>
                <operator>Equals</operator>
                <sequenceNumber>1</sequenceNumber>
                <sourceField>ApplicationForm.Name</sourceField>
                <value>test</value>
            </condition>
            <criteriaType>AND</criteriaType>
            <executionType>CONDITION</executionType>
            <logicalExpression>1</logicalExpression>
            <targetObject>ApplicationForm</targetObject>
        </criteria>
        <userPermission>ProcessOrder</userPermission>
        <fromStageValue>Initiated</fromStageValue>
        <toStageValue>On Hold</toStageValue>
        <stepGroup>
            <name>Initiated-On Hold</name>
            <step>
                <apiName>Autotask_step_defn</apiName>
                <flowDefinitionName>disputemanagement__InvokeAsyncAction</flowDefinitionName>
                <name>Autotask step defn</name>
                <runAsUser>testuser@domain.com</runAsUser>
                <stepType>AutoTask</stepType>
            </step>
            <step>
                <apiName>testScreenFlow</apiName>
                <assignedToUser>testuser@domain.com</assignedToUser>
                <flowDefinitionName>cms_orch__CMS_NotifyRequester</flowDefinitionName>
                <name>testScreenFlow</name>
                <stepType>ManualTask</stepType>
                <dependency>
                   <step>Autotask_step_defn</step>
                </dependency>
            </step>
        </stepGroup>
    </stageTransition>
    <stageValue>
        <value>Initiated</value>
        <criteria>
            <condition>
                <operator>Equals</operator>
                <sequenceNumber>1</sequenceNumber>
                <sourceField>ApplicationForm.Name</sourceField>
                <value>test</value>
            </condition>
            <criteriaType>AND</criteriaType>
            <executionType>CONDITION</executionType>
            <logicalExpression>1</logicalExpression>
            <targetObject>ApplicationForm</targetObject>
        </criteria>
        <stepGroup>
            <name>Initiated</name>
            <step>
                <apiName>Autotask_step_defn</apiName>
                <flowDefinitionName>disputemanagement__InvokeAsyncAction</flowDefinitionName>
                <name>Autotask step defn</name>
                <runAsUser>testuser@domain.com</runAsUser>
                <stepType>AutoTask</stepType>
            </step>
            <step>
                <apiName>testScreenFlow</apiName>
                <assignedToUser>testuser@domain.com</assignedToUser>
                <flowDefinitionName>cms_orch__CMS_NotifyRequester</flowDefinitionName>
                <name>testScreenFlow</name>
                <stepType>ManualTask</stepType>
                <dependency>
                    <step>Autotask_step_defn</step>
                </dependency>
            </step>
        </stepGroup>
    </stageValue>
    <stageValue>
        <value>On Hold</value>
    </stageValue>
</StageDefinition>
